Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Catherine A. Walsh, Esq. of the Law Offices of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel. 925.825.9500 ext 811, for defendant and moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling, which was not contested, re: DEFENDANT DULCE ESPINOZA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions. THERE APPEARS TO BE NO OPPOSITION PAPERS FILED IN RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT CULCE MARIA EXPINOZA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL GRANT DEFENDANT'S MOTION AND IMPOSE SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 WHICH WILL BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. (THE COURT WILL SIGN THE ORDER SUBMITTED AS AMENDED BY THE TERMS OF THIS INTENDED DECISION.) Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Assigned To Arbitration On Apr-07-14
